# Ratchet Review

> A 5-layer adversarial quality gate for Claude Code that catches factual errors, score inflation, and buried conclusions before your AI output ships.

## Core Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/Rofi7777/ratchet-review/blob/main/README.md): Overview, installation, usage, FAQ
- [Architecture](https://github.com/Rofi7777/ratchet-review/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): 5-layer system design deep dive
- [Customization](https://github.com/Rofi7777/ratchet-review/blob/main/docs/customization.md): How to add personas, anchors, format rules

## Skill Files

- [SKILL.md](https://github.com/Rofi7777/ratchet-review/blob/main/skill/SKILL.md): Core engine specification
- [PPTX-RULES.md](https://github.com/Rofi7777/ratchet-review/blob/main/skill/PPTX-RULES.md): Presentation review rules
- [DESIGN-RULES.md](https://github.com/Rofi7777/ratchet-review/blob/main/skill/DESIGN-RULES.md): Visual asset review rules

## Examples

- [Before/After](https://github.com/Rofi7777/ratchet-review/blob/main/examples/before-after/email-review.md): Complete review cycle walkthrough
- [Personas](https://github.com/Rofi7777/ratchet-review/tree/main/examples/personas): Reader persona templates
- [Anchors](https://github.com/Rofi7777/ratchet-review/tree/main/examples/anchors): Scoring calibration examples
